c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: App's intuitive design, simplicity of rating movies, and overall user experience are key factors.  Apps with a clean, well-organized interface and easy-to-navigate rating system will score higher.

The ability to rate movies with precise numerical values (e.g., 1-5 stars) or a more detailed rating scale (e.g., a 1-10 scale) impacts the ranking. A more granular system allows for greater expression of opinion.
Apps with robust social features like user profiles, friend lists, movie tracking, and discussion forums tend to rank higher, as they offer a more engaging and collaborative experience.
The comprehensiveness of the movie database is crucial. Apps that cover a wider range of films, including independent and foreign titles, are preferred.
The ability to access saved ratings and movie information offline is a desirable feature, particularly for users who frequently travel or have limited connectivity.
